requirement_topic.en: IoT Cybersecurity — ISMS-P / IITP IoT Security Guidelines (MSIT / KISA)
requirement_topic.zh: 物联网网络安全——ISMS-P / IITP物联网安全指南（科技部 / KISA）
requirement_topic.zht: 物聯網網路安全——ISMS-P / IITP物聯網安全指南（科技部 / KISA）

summary.en: South Korea has established cybersecurity requirements for connected IoT devices and networked products under a framework administered jointly by MSIT (Ministry of Science and ICT), KISA (Korea Internet and Security Agency), and IITP (Institute for Information and Communications Technology Promotion). The primary instrument is the ISMS-P (Information Security Management System — Personal Information) certification scheme under the Act on Promotion of Information and Communications Network Utilization and Information Protection (정보통신망 이용촉진 및 정보보호 등에 관한 법률), which is mandatory for certain categories of information and communications service providers (ICTSPs) including operators of networks, data centres, and platforms with significant user bases (generally mandatory for ICTSPs with over 1 million users or KRW 10 billion revenue); it is not directly mandatory for hardware product manufacturers as a product-level KC Mark requirement. However, IITP has published IoT Device Security Guidelines (IoT 공통 보안 가이드라인 and IoT 보안 인증 제도) that set minimum security requirements for IoT devices — covering secure boot, firmware update mechanisms, authentication, network communication security, and vulnerability disclosure. The IoT Security Certification Scheme (IoT 보안 인증) administered by KISA provides voluntary IoT product security certification at Basic and Advanced levels. For products that process personal data or connect to critical infrastructure, MSIT and KISA guidance recommends implementing IITP IoT security baseline controls. As of 2026, IoT hardware security certification remains largely voluntary for consumer wireless devices, but regulatory direction is toward mandatory requirements for high-risk IoT categories. Manufacturers should monitor MSIT and KISA announcements for mandatory IoT security certification updates.
summary.zh: 韩国在MSIT（科学技术信息通信部）、KISA（韩国互联网安全院）和IITP（信息通信技术规划评价院）联合管理的框架下，对联网物联网设备及网络产品建立了网络安全要求。主要法律依据为依据《促进信息通信网络利用及信息保护等相关法律》（정보통신망 이용촉진 및 정보보호 등에 관한 법률）建立的ISMS-P（信息安全管理体系——个人信息）认证方案，该方案对特定类别的信息通信服务提供商（ICTSP）具有强制性，包括拥有大量用户群体的网络运营商、数据中心及平台运营商（通常强制适用于用户超过100万或年收入超过100亿韩元的ICTSP）；对于硬件产品制造商，该方案并非作为产品级KC认证要求的直接强制规定。然而，IITP已发布《物联网通用安全指南》（IoT 공통 보안 가이드라인）及《物联网安全认证制度》（IoT 보안 인증 제도），为物联网设备设定了涵盖安全启动、固件更新机制、身份认证、网络通信安全及漏洞披露等方面的最低安全要求。由KISA管理的物联网安全认证方案（IoT 보안 인증）提供基础级和高级两个层次的自愿性物联网产品安全认证。对于处理个人数据或连接关键基础设施的产品，MSIT和KISA指南建议落实IITP物联网安全基线控制。截至2026年，物联网硬件安全认证对于消费类无线设备仍主要为自愿性质，但监管方向正朝着对高风险物联网类别实施强制性要求发展。制造商应持续关注MSIT和KISA关于物联网安全认证强制化的公告。
summary.zht: 韓國在MSIT（科學技術信息通信部）、KISA（韓國互聯網安全院）和IITP（信息通信技術規劃評價院）聯合管理的框架下，對聯網物聯網裝置及網路產品建立了網路安全要求。主要法律依據為依據《促進信息通信網路利用及信息保護等相關法律》（정보통신망 이용촉진 및 정보보호 등에 관한 법률）建立的ISMS-P（信息安全管理體系——個人信息）認證方案，該方案對特定類別的信息通信服務提供商（ICTSP）具有強制性，包括擁有大量用戶群體的網路運營商、數據中心及平台運營商（通常強制適用於用戶超過100萬或年收入超過100億韓元的ICTSP）；對於硬件產品製造商，該方案並非作為產品級KC認證要求的直接強制規定。然而，IITP已發布《物聯網通用安全指南》（IoT 공통 보안 가이드라인）及《物聯網安全認證制度》（IoT 보안 인증 제도），為物聯網裝置設定了涵蓋安全啟動、固件更新機制、身份認證、網路通信安全及漏洞披露等方面的最低安全要求。由KISA管理的物聯網安全認證方案（IoT 보안 인증）提供基礎級和高級兩個層次的自願性物聯網產品安全認證。對於處理個人數據或連接關鍵基礎設施的產品，MSIT和KISA指南建議落實IITP物聯網安全基線控制。截至2026年，物聯網硬件安全認證對於消費類無線裝置仍主要為自願性質，但監管方向正朝著對高風險物聯網類別實施強制性要求發展。製造商應持續關注MSIT和KISA關於物聯網安全認證強制化的公告。

standards_or_laws: Act on Promotion of Information and Communications Network Utilization and Information Protection (정보통신망 이용촉진 및 정보보호 등에 관한 법률) — ISMS-P mandatory for qualifying ICTSPs (MSIT / KISA)
IITP IoT Common Security Guidelines (IoT 공통 보안 가이드라인) — baseline IoT device security controls (MSIT / IITP)
KISA IoT Security Certification Scheme (IoT 보안 인증 제도) — voluntary IoT product security certification at Basic and Advanced levels (KISA)

summary.en: China mandates cybersecurity compliance for networked and IoT products under the Cybersecurity Law of the People's Republic of China (2017), the Data Security Law (2021), and the Personal Information Protection Law (PIPL, 2021). The Multi-Level Protection Scheme (MLPS / 等级保护 2.0, GB/T 22239-2019) requires operators of network facilities and information systems to implement security controls commensurate with their security level classification; MLPS level 2 and above require filing with public security authorities. IoT device manufacturers must comply with applicable GB/T standards for IoT security (e.g., GB/T 37024, GB/T 37093) and the MIIT IoT security technical requirements. Products connected to critical information infrastructure (CII) face additional obligations. China's MLPS/等级保护 cybersecurity framework is China-specific and does not satisfy South Korean ISMS-P or IITP IoT security requirements.
summary.zh: 中国依据《中华人民共和国网络安全法》（2017年）、《数据安全法》（2021年）及《个人信息保护法》（PIPL，2021年）对网络及物联网产品强制要求网络安全合规。网络安全等级保护制度（MLPS / 等级保护2.0，GB/T 22239-2019）要求网络设施及信息系统运营者按其安全级别分类实施相应安全控制措施；等级保护二级及以上需向公安机关备案。物联网设备制造商须遵守适用的物联网安全GB/T标准（如GB/T 37024、GB/T 37093）及工信部物联网安全技术要求。连接关键信息基础设施（CII）的产品须履行额外义务。中国MLPS / 等级保护网络安全框架针对中国市场，不满足韩国ISMS-P或IITP物联网安全要求。
summary.zht: 中國依據《中華人民共和國網路安全法》（2017年）、《數據安全法》（2021年）及《個人信息保護法》（PIPL，2021年）對網路及物聯網產品強制要求網路安全合規。網路安全等級保護制度（MLPS / 等級保護2.0，GB/T 22239-2019）要求網路設施及信息系統運營者按其安全級別分類實施相應安全控制措施；等級保護二級及以上需向公安機關備案。物聯網裝置製造商須遵守適用的物聯網安全GB/T標準（如GB/T 37024、GB/T 37093）及工信部物聯網安全技術要求。連接關鍵信息基礎設施（CII）的產品須履行額外義務。中國MLPS / 等級保護網路安全框架針對中國市場，不滿足韓國ISMS-P或IITP物聯網安全要求。

standards_or_laws: Cybersecurity Law of the People's Republic of China (2017) — general network security obligations (CAC / MIIT)
Multi-Level Protection Scheme (MLPS / 等级保护 2.0) — GB/T 22239-2019: Network security level protection basic requirements (MIIT / MPS)
GB/T 37024 / GB/T 37093 — IoT device security technical requirements (SAC / MIIT)

gap.en: China's MLPS / 等级保护 cybersecurity framework and GB/T IoT security standards do not satisfy South Korean ISMS-P or IITP IoT security requirements — these are entirely distinct national frameworks with different scopes, obligations, and assessment procedures. Key gaps: (1) ISMS-P in South Korea is mandatory for qualifying information and communications service providers (platforms, networks, data centres) — if the wireless IoT product is bundled with a cloud service or app that processes Korean users' personal data and the service reaches ISMS-P thresholds, the service operator must obtain ISMS-P certification, separate from and in addition to KC product certification; (2) for the hardware device itself, IITP IoT security baseline controls (secure boot, firmware update integrity, authentication, encrypted communications, vulnerability disclosure) are strongly recommended and may become mandatory for high-risk categories — manufacturers should self-assess against IITP IoT Common Security Guidelines and consider voluntary KISA IoT security certification to signal market readiness; (3) Chinese MIIT IoT security technical requirements and GB/T 37024 / 37093 do not map directly to IITP IoT guidelines — separate documentation of Korean-market security controls is required; (4) a common oversight: manufacturers focus on KC radio / EMC / safety and do not assess cybersecurity obligations — for IoT products with cloud connectivity, the combination of KC product certification and ISMS-P service certification (where applicable) represents the full Korean market compliance picture.
gap.zh: 中国MLPS / 等级保护网络安全框架及GB/T物联网安全标准不满足韩国ISMS-P或IITP物联网安全要求——这些是完全不同的国家框架，在适用范围、义务和评估程序方面均存在差异。主要差距：（1）韩国ISMS-P对符合条件的信息通信服务提供商（平台、网络、数据中心）具有强制性——如果无线物联网产品与处理韩国用户个人数据的云服务或应用程序捆绑，且该服务达到ISMS-P门槛，服务运营商须取得ISMS-P认证，该认证独立于KC产品认证且须额外取得；（2）对于硬件设备本身，IITP物联网安全基线控制（安全启动、固件更新完整性、身份认证、加密通信、漏洞披露）受到强烈推荐，并可能对高风险类别产品变为强制性要求——制造商应依据IITP《物联网通用安全指南》进行自评估，并考虑申请KISA物联网安全自愿认证以彰显市场准备度；（3）中国工信部物联网安全技术要求及GB/T 37024 / 37093与IITP物联网指南无直接对应关系——须为韩国市场单独准备安全控制文件；（4）常见疏忽：制造商专注于KC无线电/EMC/安全认证而未评估网络安全义务——对于具备云连接功能的物联网产品，KC产品认证加ISMS-P服务认证（如适用）共同构成完整的韩国市场合规图景。
gap.zht: 中國MLPS / 等級保護網路安全框架及GB/T物聯網安全標準不滿足韓國ISMS-P或IITP物聯網安全要求——這些是完全不同的國家框架，在適用範圍、義務和評估程序方面均存在差異。主要差距：（1）韓國ISMS-P對符合條件的信息通信服務提供商（平台、網路、數據中心）具有強制性——如果無線物聯網裝置與處理韓國用戶個人數據的雲服務或應用程序捆綁，且該服務達到ISMS-P門檻，服務運營商須取得ISMS-P認證，該認證獨立於KC產品認證且須額外取得；（2）對於硬件裝置本身，IITP物聯網安全基線控制（安全啟動、固件更新完整性、身份認證、加密通信、漏洞披露）受到強烈推薦，並可能對高風險類別產品變為強制性要求——製造商應依據IITP《物聯網通用安全指南》進行自評估，並考慮申請KISA物聯網安全自願認證以彰顯市場準備度；（3）中國工信部物聯網安全技術要求及GB/T 37024 / 37093與IITP物聯網指南無直接對應關係——須為韓國市場單獨準備安全控制文件；（4）常見疏忽：製造商專注於KC無線電/EMC/安全認證而未評估網路安全義務——對於具備雲連接功能的物聯網裝置，KC產品認證加ISMS-P服務認證（如適用）共同構成完整的韓國市場合規圖景。

mandatory_status.target: Mixed — ISMS-P certification mandatory for qualifying ICTSPs (platforms/networks/data centres meeting user/revenue thresholds); IITP IoT security baseline guidelines strongly recommended and monitor for mandatory IoT hardware security requirements (KISA voluntary IoT security certification available for hardware products)
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory (for certain categories) — MLPS level classification and filing mandatory for operators of networks and information systems; GB/T IoT security standards apply to IoT device manufacturers under MIIT framework

source.publisher: Korea Internet and Security Agency (KISA) — Ministry of Science and ICT (MSIT)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] South Korea's cybersecurity landscape for wireless and IoT devices involves two parallel tracks: (1) ISMS-P service-level certification (mandatory for qualifying ICTSPs whose cloud platform or app processes Korean users' personal data); and (2) IITP IoT device security guidelines / KISA voluntary IoT security certification (currently voluntary for hardware, with mandatory requirements likely for high-risk IoT categories in future). Chinese MLPS / 等级保护 and GB/T IoT security documentation carry no equivalence. Manufacturers of cloud-connected wireless IoT devices should assess ISMS-P obligations for their Korean service operations and self-assess device security against IITP IoT Common Security Guidelines. Monitor MSIT and KISA for mandatory IoT hardware security certification developments.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 韩国针对无线及物联网设备的网络安全监管涉及两条并行轨道：（1）ISMS-P服务级认证（对云平台或应用处理韩国用户个人数据且达到门槛条件的ICTSP具有强制性）；（2）IITP物联网设备安全指南 / KISA自愿性物联网安全认证（目前对硬件为自愿性质，未来高风险物联网类别可能实施强制性要求）。中国MLPS / 等级保护及GB/T物联网安全文件不具同等效力。具备云连接功能的无线物联网设备制造商应评估其韩国服务运营的ISMS-P义务，并依据IITP《物联网通用安全指南》对设备安全进行自评估。请持续关注MSIT和KISA关于物联网硬件安全认证强制化的最新动态。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 韓國針對無線及物聯網裝置的網路安全監管涉及兩條並行軌道：（1）ISMS-P服務級認證（對雲平台或應用處理韓國用戶個人數據且達到門檻條件的ICTSP具有強制性）；（2）IITP物聯網裝置安全指南 / KISA自願性物聯網安全認證（目前對硬件為自願性質，未來高風險物聯網類別可能實施強制性要求）。中國MLPS / 等級保護及GB/T物聯網安全文件不具同等效力。具備雲連接功能的無線物聯網裝置製造商應評估其韓國服務運營的ISMS-P義務，並依據IITP《物聯網通用安全指南》對裝置安全進行自評估。請持續關注MSIT和KISA關於物聯網硬件安全認證強制化的最新動態。
